name: Oatmeal/Wheat Germ Dog Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Whole wheat or rye flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the whole wheat flour, uncooked oatmeal, and wheat germ.
2. Add margarine, molasses, evaporated milk, and water to the dry ingredients.
3. Thoroughly mix all ingredients until a stiff dough forms.
4. Allow the dough to chill for 30 minutes.
5. Roll out small spoonfuls of dough into balls.
6. Flatten each ball slightly.
7. Place the flattened biscuits on a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake in an oven preheated to 300°F for 1 hour.
